text:
Team GB sailors Anna Burnet and John Gimson were left ‘devastated’ after being denied an early wedding present in the form of anOlympicmedal.

The pair, who are planning to get married shortly after the games inParis, finished fourth in the mixed multihull event.

They went into Thursday’s medal race third in the overall standings and while gold was out of reach they had a great shot at winning silver or bronze.

Follow Metro.co.uk’s live blog for updates from the Paris 2024 Olympics

But disaster struck just seconds into the race when officials deemed they had crossed the starting line before the starting horn had sounded.

They were disqualified from the race soon after, with Burnet visibly distressed by the situation, and as a result scored a maximum 22 points. In sailing, the fewer the points the better.

Gimson and Burnet were left hoping for the race to be called off due to a lack of wind, something that has already happened 11 times during the sailing events at this games, but luck was not on their side.

Gold went to Italy, silver to New Zealand and bronze to Argentina, with Team GB finishing just six points shy of a spot on the podium.

It’s entirely possible that they would have missed out even if they had raced, but Gimson admitted that he and his fiancée had been left ‘broken’.

He said: ‘It’s brutal. This is the most brutal way to lose because it is so far out of our control I’m so proud of this week and how we sailed.

‘We made one mistake and it’s cost us an Olympic medal so you can imagine we’re pretty broken.’

‘In that moment, it’s devastating. It’s a bad dream, but we can be proud of what we have done,’ Burnet added.

‘There’s no-one I’d rather be here with. We’re so lucky we get to do this together. The highs and lows, we are riding it together.

‘There is life and there is sport and, in this moment, I suppose life and sport are feeling a bit separate to us. The sport has been brutal, but life goes on.

‘We will get married and life will be great.’

title: Engaged Team GB stars 'broken' after 'mistake' costs them Olympic medal | Metro News
description: Team GB sailors Anna Burnet and John Gimson were left 'devastated' after being denied an early wedding present in the form of an Olympic medal.
